subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-09-19 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: There was a time when Persian was like a fragrant Bouquet, perfuming all nostrils. She was the center of the glory and honor of the world of humanity.
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
